summary: Full e2e testing of MPS Auth backend (14 pytest tests) and frontend (all 6 pages) — all core flows working

minor.issue: Root path at external URL returns React HTML (not backend JSON). Backend root only accessible internally at localhost:8001/. This is expected K8s routing behavior — document it clearly.

ui_bugs.issue: Stat cards and recent-audit-table show skeleton loading state briefly on initial load — data populates after. Not a bug, just a timing observation.

critical_code_review_comments: CORS: CORS_ORIGINS='*' with allow_credentials=True will cause browsers to reject credentialed requests. Browsers require explicit origin (not wildcard) when credentials are sent. Fix: set CORS_ORIGINS to the actual frontend domain.
Users list API returns paginated response with 'items' key (not 'users') — document consistently in API response schema
User email is silently lowercased on creation — should be documented or communicated in API response

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, all data-testid elements found)

seed_data_creation: Created test users (test_user_<timestamp>@mps.edu.au) and students (TEST<timestamp>) via API during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working. Frontend pages: /auth/login, /auth/dashboard, /auth/users, /auth/students, /auth/apps, /auth/audit all functional. Key CORS issue: CORS_ORIGINS=* will break credentialed requests from browsers — needs to be set to explicit frontend domain.
rca_of_issues: CORS wildcard with credentials: FastAPI CORSMiddleware with allow_origins=['*'] and allow_credentials=True is rejected by browsers per CORS spec. The backend .env has CORS_ORIGINS='*' which is split into ['*']. Browser requests with cookies will fail in production. Fix: set CORS_ORIGINS=https://user-gateway-66.preview.emergentagent.com (or the production domain).
